title.en: Conformance and Wire Format: The PICS Proformas and Auto Attach TLVs
title.zh: 符合性与线上格式：PICS 一致性声明表与自动接入 TLV

blocks.en: This lesson covers the three normative annexes that close out IEEE Std 802.1Qcj-2023, Amendment 37 (Automatic Attachment to Provider Backbone Bridging services). Two of them are PICS proformas and one defines the actual bits on the wire. PICS stands for Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement: a checklist a vendor fills in to declare exactly which optional and mandatory features their product implements, so a buyer or test lab can verify conformance against the standard. Annex A is the PICS for Bridge implementations; Annex B is the PICS for End station implementations; Annex D defines the IEEE 802.1 Organizationally Specific TLVs (Type-Length-Value fields) that carry Auto Attach signaling inside LLDP.
blocks.zh: 本课讲解 IEEE Std 802.1Qcj-2023（修正案 37，自动接入到运营商骨干桥接服务）末尾的三个规范性附录。其中两个是 PICS 一致性声明表，另一个定义了真正在链路上传输的比特。PICS 全称为 Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement（协议实现一致性声明）：这是供应商填写的一份清单，用来声明其产品实现了哪些可选和强制特性，使采购方或测试实验室能够据此核验是否符合标准。附录 A 是桥（Bridge）实现的 PICS；附录 B 是端站（End station）实现的 PICS；附录 D 定义了 IEEE 802.1 组织专用 TLV（Type-Length-Value，类型-长度-值字段），它们在 LLDP 中承载自动接入信令。

blocks.en: First, the cast of acronyms. PBB is Provider Backbone Bridging, the carrier backbone that hides customer addresses behind a backbone MAC header. A BEB (Backbone Edge Bridge) sits at the edge of that backbone; a BEB-I is the I-component variant that maps service frames into I-SIDs (Service Instance Identifiers). AAB means Auto Attach BEB, the backbone-side device that receives and grants VID/I-SID assignment requests (a VID is a VLAN Identifier). AAD means Auto Attach Device, the access-side device that asks to be attached. The whole point of Auto Attach is that an AAD discovers an AAB over LLDP (Link Layer Discovery Protocol) and negotiates its VLAN-to-service mapping automatically, instead of an operator hand-provisioning every port.
blocks.zh: 先认识一组缩写。PBB 是 Provider Backbone Bridging（运营商骨干桥接），它是把客户地址隐藏在骨干 MAC 头之后的运营商骨干网。BEB（Backbone Edge Bridge，骨干边缘桥）位于该骨干的边缘；BEB-I 是其 I-组件变体，负责把业务帧映射到 I-SID（Service Instance Identifier，业务实例标识符）。AAB 指 Auto Attach BEB（自动接入骨干边缘桥），即骨干侧设备，负责接收并批准 VID/I-SID 分配请求（VID 即 VLAN Identifier，VLAN 标识符）。AAD 指 Auto Attach Device（自动接入设备），即接入侧设备，负责请求接入。自动接入的核心就是：AAD 通过 LLDP（Link Layer Discovery Protocol，链路层发现协议）发现 AAB，并自动协商其 VLAN 到业务的映射，而无需运营商逐端口手工配置。

blocks.en: How to read a PICS row: each row has an Item (a short label), a Feature question, a Status, and References. Status codes are the grammar of conformance — M means Mandatory, O means Optional, X means prohibited/excluded, and predicates like (AAB OR AAD):M mean 'mandatory IF you claimed AAB or AAD'. The colon reads as 'then'. A row marked N/A simply means the feature does not apply to this implementation.
blocks.zh: 如何读懂 PICS 表的一行：每行包含 Item（简短标签）、Feature（特性问题）、Status（状态）和 References（引用条款）。状态码是一致性的语法——M 表示强制（Mandatory），O 表示可选（Optional），X 表示禁止/排除（excluded），而像 (AAB OR AAD):M 这样的谓词表示“如果你声明了 AAB 或 AAD，则强制”。冒号读作“则”。标记为 N/A 的行表示该特性不适用于本实现。

blocks.en: Annex A — the Bridge PICS — does not rewrite the whole proforma; an amendment only inserts new rows into existing tables. It adds two rows to A.5 Major capabilities (the AAB and AAD feature questions), a row to A.14 Bridge management (MGT-253, pointing at the PBBN Auto Attach management entities in 12.34), and two rows to A.24 MIB for the IEEE8021-PBBN-AA-MIB and LLDP EVB extensions MIB modules. It also adds a row to A.47 YANG for the ieee802-dot1q-lldp-pbbn-aa-tlv module. Finally it appends a brand-new clause A.54 PBBN auto attach, a self-contained table of AAB-1 through AAB-7 and AAD-1 through AAD-4 rows that nail down exactly which TLVs, state machines, and tagging interfaces a conforming bridge must support.
blocks.zh: 附录 A——桥的 PICS——并不重写整张声明表；修正案只是向既有表格中插入新行。它向 A.5 主要能力（Major capabilities）插入两行（AAB 与 AAD 特性问题），向 A.14 桥管理（Bridge management）插入一行（MGT-253，指向 12.34 中的 PBBN 自动接入管理实体），并向 A.24 MIB 插入两行，对应 IEEE8021-PBBN-AA-MIB 与 LLDP EVB 扩展 MIB 模块。它还向 A.47 YANG 插入一行，对应 ieee802-dot1q-lldp-pbbn-aa-tlv 模块。最后它在末尾追加全新的条款 A.54 PBBN 自动接入，这是一张独立的表格，包含 AAB-1 至 AAB-7 与 AAD-1 至 AAD-4 各行，精确规定了符合标准的桥必须支持哪些 TLV、状态机和打标签接口。

blocks.en: Annex B — the End station PICS — is the lighter cousin. An end station can never be the backbone AAB, so Annex B only deals with the AAD role. It inserts one AAD row into B.5 Major capabilities (marked O, optional) and appends a new clause B.20 PBBN Auto Attach with four rows, AAD-1 through AAD-4: support LLDP transmit/receive mode, support the PBBN Auto Attach System TLV, support the PBBN Auto Attach Assignment TLV, and support the AAD state machine. If the end station does not claim AAD in B.5, the entire B.20 table is marked N/A and ignored.
blocks.zh: 附录 B——端站的 PICS——是更轻量的对应版本。端站永远不可能是骨干侧的 AAB，因此附录 B 只涉及 AAD 角色。它向 B.5 主要能力插入一行 AAD（标记为 O，可选），并追加新条款 B.20 PBBN 自动接入，包含四行 AAD-1 至 AAD-4：支持 LLDP 收发模式、支持 PBBN 自动接入系统 TLV、支持 PBBN 自动接入分配 TLV，以及支持 AAD 状态机。如果端站在 B.5 中未声明 AAD，则整张 B.20 表标记为 N/A 并忽略。

blocks.en: Notice the symmetry between the two PICS: Annex A's A.54 lists both AAB and AAD rows because a bridge can play either role; Annex B's B.20 lists only AAD rows. The AAD-1..AAD-4 questions are word-for-word identical in both annexes — the same four obligations follow the AAD role wherever it lives.
blocks.zh: 注意两份 PICS 之间的对称性：附录 A 的 A.54 同时列出 AAB 和 AAD 各行，因为桥可以扮演任一角色；附录 B 的 B.20 只列出 AAD 各行。AAD-1 至 AAD-4 这几个问题在两个附录中逐字相同——无论 AAD 角色身处何处，都伴随同样这四项义务。

blocks.en: Annex D is where the standard stops checklisting and starts defining bits. It first edits Table D-1, the master registry of IEEE 802.1 Organizationally Specific TLVs, to add two new subtypes: 0x15 PBBN Auto Attach System TLV and 0x16 PBBN Auto Attach Assignment TLV, both belonging to the new aaSet TLV set and both referencing Clause 50 for behavior. Every such TLV shares a common header: TLV type = 127 (the IEEE 802 Organizationally Specific reserved value), a length field, the 3-octet OUI 00-80-C2 (Organizationally Unique Identifier for IEEE 802.1), and a 1-octet 802.1 subtype that selects which specific TLV this is.
blocks.zh: 附录 D 是标准从“列清单”转为“定义比特”的地方。它首先修改 Table D-1（IEEE 802.1 组织专用 TLV 的主注册表），新增两个子类型：0x15 PBBN 自动接入系统 TLV 与 0x16 PBBN 自动接入分配 TLV，二者都属于新的 aaSet TLV 集合，且都引用 Clause 50 描述其行为。每个这样的 TLV 共享一个公共头部：TLV type = 127（IEEE 802 组织专用保留值）、一个长度字段、3 字节的 OUI 00-80-C2（IEEE 802.1 的组织唯一标识符），以及 1 字节的 802.1 子类型，用以选择这具体是哪一个 TLV。

caption.en: The two Auto Attach TLVs. The System TLV is a fixed 19-octet information string (21 octets with header) carrying who-am-I state; the Assignment TLV is variable (5–510 octets) carrying up to 101 Status/VID/I-SID triples.
caption.zh: 两个自动接入 TLV。系统 TLV 是固定 19 字节的信息串（含头部共 21 字节），承载“我是谁”的状态；分配 TLV 是可变长度（5–510 字节），承载最多 101 个 Status/VID/I-SID 三元组。

blocks.en: The PBBN Auto Attach System TLV (D.2.17) is how a device advertises its identity and readiness. Its System Type field (D.2.17.7, Table D-17) is a 3-bit code: value 1 = AAB, 2 = C-VLAN aware AAD, 3 = VLAN-unaware AAD, 4 = S-VLAN aware AAD. The Assoc State field (D.2.17.5, Table D-16) is a small state register the partners exchange — NOT_READY (0x00), READY_TO_ASSOC (0x01), READY_TO_ATTACH (0x02), ASSOC_ATTACHED (0x03), and several failure codes such as ASSOC_FAILED_TAGS (0x22, tagging mismatch) or ASSOC_FAILED_TOPO (0x32, a multi-point link was detected). The Tagging field (D.2.17.8) states whether the link carries all-tagged, untagged-and-tagged, or untagged-only traffic, and the AAB must honor what the AAD requests. The PortNetId (D.2.17.10) is a 12-octet identifier — System MAC address plus a port/aggregator IfIndex — so an AAD knows which single AAB it is bound to (one AAD associates to exactly one AAB; an AAB associates to one AAD per port).
blocks.zh: PBBN 自动接入系统 TLV（D.2.17）是设备宣告自身身份与就绪状态的方式。其 System Type 字段（D.2.17.7，Table D-17）是 3 比特编码：值 1 = AAB，2 = 感知 C-VLAN 的 AAD，3 = 不感知 VLAN 的 AAD，4 = 感知 S-VLAN 的 AAD。Assoc State 字段（D.2.17.5，Table D-16）是双方交换的一个小型状态寄存器——NOT_READY（0x00）、READY_TO_ASSOC（0x01）、READY_TO_ATTACH（0x02）、ASSOC_ATTACHED（0x03），以及若干失败码，如 ASSOC_FAILED_TAGS（0x22，打标签不匹配）或 ASSOC_FAILED_TOPO（0x32，检测到多点链路）。Tagging 字段（D.2.17.8）说明链路承载全打标签、打标签与不打标签混合，还是仅不打标签的流量，且 AAB 必须遵从 AAD 的请求。PortNetId（D.2.17.10）是 12 字节标识符——系统 MAC 地址加上端口/聚合器的 IfIndex——使 AAD 知道自己绑定到哪一个唯一的 AAB（一个 AAD 恰好关联一个 AAB；一个 AAB 每端口关联一个 AAD）。

blocks.en: The PBBN Auto Attach Assignment TLV (D.2.18) is the request/response payload. An AAD lists the VID/I-SID pairs it wants the AAB to enable. Each entry is a Status/VID/I-SID triple: the AAD sends VID (12 bits) and I-SID (3 octets), and the AAB fills in the 4-bit Assignment Status on the way back (Table D-20): Pending (1), Accepted (2), Rejected: Generic (3), or specific rejections like Invalid VLAN ID (5) or Invalid I-SID (7). The Number of assignments field (D.2.18.5) ranges 0–101; with the TLV information string capped at 511 octets, 101 five-octet triples fill it to 510 octets. This is the mechanism that turns 'I would like these services' into 'here is what I granted you' over a single LLDP exchange.
blocks.zh: PBBN 自动接入分配 TLV（D.2.18）是请求/响应的有效载荷。AAD 列出它希望 AAB 启用的 VID/I-SID 对。每个条目是一个 Status/VID/I-SID 三元组：AAD 发送 VID（12 比特）和 I-SID（3 字节），而 AAB 在回程时填入 4 比特的 Assignment Status（Table D-20）：Pending（1，待定）、Accepted（2，接受）、Rejected: Generic（3，一般性拒绝），或具体拒绝原因如 Invalid VLAN ID（5，无效 VLAN ID）或 Invalid I-SID（7，无效 I-SID）。Number of assignments 字段（D.2.18.5）取值 0–101；由于 TLV 信息串上限为 511 字节，101 个五字节三元组恰好填到 510 字节。这一机制把“我想要这些业务”通过单次 LLDP 交换转化为“这是我批准给你的内容”。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant AAD as AAD (access)
  participant AAB as AAB (backbone)
  AAD->>AAB: System TLV (Type=AAD, Assoc=READY_TO_ASSOC, Tagging)
  AAB->>AAD: System TLV (Type=AAB, Assoc=READY_TO_ATTACH, PortNetId)
  AAD->>AAB: Assignment TLV (VID/I-SID requests)
  AAB->>AAD: Assignment TLV (Status=Accepted/Rejected)
  AAB->>AAD: System TLV (Assoc=ASSOC_ATTACHED)
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant AAD as AAD（接入侧）
  participant AAB as AAB（骨干侧）
  AAD->>AAB: 系统 TLV（类型=AAD，状态=就绪关联，打标签）
  AAB->>AAD: 系统 TLV（类型=AAB，状态=可附着，PortNetId）
  AAD->>AAB: 分配 TLV（VID/I-SID 请求）
  AAB->>AAD: 分配 TLV（状态=接受/拒绝）
  AAB->>AAD: 系统 TLV（状态=已附着）

summary.en: Coverage map: exact clause numbers in Annexes A, B, and D
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：附录 A、B、D 的精确条款编号

blocks.en: Annex A (normative, Bridge PICS): A.5 inserts the AAB and AAD Major-capability rows; A.14 inserts MGT-253 (PBBN Auto Attach management entities, ref 12.34); A.24 inserts MIB-45 (IEEE8021-PBBN-AA-MIB) and MIB-46 (LLDP EVB extensions MIB, ref D.5.6); A.47 inserts YANG-LLDP-PBBN-AA (ieee802-dot1q-lldp-pbbn-aa-tlv, ref D.6.6.7); and new clause A.54 PBBN auto attach lists AAB-1..AAB-7 (I-components, LLDP mode, System TLV, Assignment TLV, C-tagging interface, AAB state machine in 50.7, optional Management VID TLV D.2.6) and AAD-1..AAD-4 (LLDP mode, System TLV, Assignment TLV, AAD state machine in 50.6). Annex B (normative, End station PICS): B.5 inserts the optional AAD Major-capability row; new clause B.20 PBBN Auto Attach lists AAD-1..AAD-4, identical to Annex A's AAD rows. Annex D (normative, IEEE 802.1 Organizationally Specific TLVs): D.1 edits Table D-1 to register subtype 0x15 (PBBN Auto Attach System TLV → D.2.17) and 0x16 (PBBN Auto Attach Assignment TLV → D.2.18), both in aaSet, both referencing Clause 50; D.2.17 defines the System TLV with subclauses .1–.11 (type=127, length=19, OUI 00-80-C2, subtype=21, Assoc State per Table D-16, System Type per Table D-17, Tagging per Table D-18, PortNetId per Table D-19, one-per-LLDPDU rule); D.2.18 defines the Assignment TLV with subclauses .1–.6 (variable 5–510 octets, up to 101 triples, Assignment Status per Table D-20).
blocks.zh: 附录 A（规范性，桥 PICS）：A.5 插入 AAB 与 AAD 主要能力行；A.14 插入 MGT-253（PBBN 自动接入管理实体，引用 12.34）；A.24 插入 MIB-45（IEEE8021-PBBN-AA-MIB）与 MIB-46（LLDP EVB 扩展 MIB，引用 D.5.6）；A.47 插入 YANG-LLDP-PBBN-AA（ieee802-dot1q-lldp-pbbn-aa-tlv，引用 D.6.6.7）；新条款 A.54 PBBN 自动接入列出 AAB-1 至 AAB-7（I-组件、LLDP 模式、系统 TLV、分配 TLV、C-打标签接口、AAB 状态机见 50.7、可选的管理 VID TLV 见 D.2.6）与 AAD-1 至 AAD-4（LLDP 模式、系统 TLV、分配 TLV、AAD 状态机见 50.6）。附录 B（规范性，端站 PICS）：B.5 插入可选的 AAD 主要能力行；新条款 B.20 PBBN 自动接入列出 AAD-1 至 AAD-4，与附录 A 的 AAD 各行相同。附录 D（规范性，IEEE 802.1 组织专用 TLV）：D.1 修改 Table D-1，注册子类型 0x15（PBBN 自动接入系统 TLV → D.2.17）与 0x16（PBBN 自动接入分配 TLV → D.2.18），二者均属 aaSet 且均引用 Clause 50；D.2.17 定义系统 TLV，含子条款 .1–.11（type=127、长度=19、OUI 00-80-C2、子类型=21、Assoc State 见 Table D-16、System Type 见 Table D-17、Tagging 见 Table D-18、PortNetId 见 Table D-19、每个 LLDPDU 只含一个的规则）；D.2.18 定义分配 TLV，含子条款 .1–.6（可变 5–510 字节、最多 101 个三元组、Assignment Status 见 Table D-20）。

blocks.en: Why this matters as a reference: when you implement or test Auto Attach, the two PICS proformas tell you what to claim and verify, while Annex D tells you exactly how to encode every claimed feature on the wire. The two halves are deliberately joined — every AAB-x / AAD-x checklist row points back to a D.2.17 / D.2.18 field or a Clause 50 state machine.
blocks.zh: 为何它具有参考价值：当你实现或测试自动接入时，两份 PICS 声明表告诉你需要声明和核验什么，而附录 D 则精确告诉你如何把每个已声明的特性编码到链路上。两部分是刻意连结在一起的——每一行 AAB-x / AAD-x 清单都回指到 D.2.17 / D.2.18 的某个字段或某个 Clause 50 状态机。

cites.note: Annex A — Bridge PICS proforma: inserted rows in A.5, A.14, A.24, A.47 and new clause A.54 (AAB-1..7, AAD-1..4).
Annex B — End station PICS proforma: inserted AAD row in B.5 and new clause B.20 (AAD-1..4).
Annex D — IEEE 802.1 Organizationally Specific TLVs: Table D-1 subtypes 0x15/0x16, D.2.17 System TLV, D.2.18 Assignment TLV with Tables D-16..D-20.
